mnemonics: S.C.A.N. the Non-Recursive Algorithm: Select a characteristic operation, Count the frequency, Analyze the sum/product, Name the order of growth.
keyPoints: Identify the basic operation that contributes most to the total running time.
Determine how the number of times the basic operation is executed depends on the input size (n).
Express the algorithm's efficiency using asymptotic notation (O, Ω, Θ).
commonMistakes: Incorrectly identifying the basic operation (e.g., focusing on a trivial assignment instead of the dominant inner loop operation).
Miscounting the number of iterations, especially for nested loops where the inner loop's count depends on the outer loop's index.
